ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., recruiting, active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the patient is participating in */,
  "age_at_start" REAL /* Age of the patient at the start of the trial */,
  "age_at_end" REAL /* Age of the patient at the end of the trial */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "dose" REAL /* Dose of the treatment */,
  "administration_route" TEXT /* Administration route of the treatment */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment setting */,
  "treatment_protocol" TEXT /* Treatment protocol used in the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_treatments" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment setting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment in the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment in the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id", "treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (clinical or pathological) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Value of the response (e.g., tumor size reduction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_response_type FOREIGN KEY ("response_type") REFERENCES event_response_types ("response_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_responses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_responses" (
  "clinical_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of clinical response (e.g., Complete Response, Progressive Disease) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the clinical response */,
  "tumor_size_reduction" REAL /* Tumor size reduction */,
  "symptom_improvement" TEXT /* Symptom improvement (e.g., pain reduction, quality of life improvement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinical_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES event_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathologic_responses" (
  "pathologic_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathological response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of pathological response (e.g., Complete Response, No Response) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the pathological response */,
  "tumor_marker_levels" REAL /* Tumor marker levels */,
  "histopathology" TEXT /* Histopathology results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathologic_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathologic_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES event_responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, data analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the event setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event setting */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_response_types" (
  "response_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "response_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the response type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response type */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_arm_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "arm_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial arm */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_arm_assignments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_arm_assignments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
